description: Replace TireRings + TireTread with EKGPulse (heartbeat waveform behind severity number) and ThermalRings (radar-ping outer rings). Both are severity-color and severity-speed driven. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-18-ekg-thermal-center-design.md. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-18-ekg-thermal-tirehero.md. Read both before implementing any story.

userStories.title: Create EKGPulse.tsx — heartbeat waveform behind severity number
userStories.description: As a user I want a two-beat EKG waveform drawn inside the tire hub that pulses faster and with taller spikes as severity rises.
acceptanceCriteria: File dashboard/app/components/EKGPulse.tsx exists with 'use client' directive
Exports named EKGPulse component and EKGPulseProps interface
Props: { severity: number; severityColor: string }
buildPath(amplitude: number): string function builds 13-point two-beat EKG path (M + 12 L commands) with baseline y=200, spikes at x~163 and x~223, all points within r=80 of center (200,200)
Component renders a <clipPath id='ekg-hub-clip'> with <circle cx=200 cy=200 r=78/> and applies it to the EKG path
Subtle grid lines rendered inside clip: horizontal at y=200 (stroke #1a1a1a), y=185 and y=215 (stroke #131313)
useEffect: creates createDrawable(pathRef.current), animates draw:['0 0','0 1'] duration=PULSE_DURATION[clamped] ease='linear' loop:true
useEffect dependency array: [clamped, duration, reducedMotion]
useEffect cleanup: anim.pause() and drawable.revert()
clamped = Math.max(0, Math.min(3, Math.round(severity)))
useReducedMotion: if true, skip animate call, render path at opacity 0.65 statically
suppressHydrationWarning on the animated <path> element
Imports: animate and createDrawable from 'animejs' (v4 API)
Imports useReducedMotion from '../../lib/useReducedMotion'
cd /Users/hussianaltufayli/Downloads/LatentLap-AI-main/dashboard && npx tsc --noEmit shows 0 errors
userStories.notes: createDrawable returns Array<DrawableSVGGeometry> with no revert() method; used anim.pause() + forEach setAttribute reset for cleanup

userStories.title: Create ThermalRings.tsx — radar-ping rings driven by severity
userStories.description: As a user I want three staggered rings that pulse outward from the tire center like heat signatures, faster and in severity color as degradation rises.
acceptanceCriteria: File dashboard/app/components/ThermalRings.tsx exists with 'use client' directive
Exports named ThermalRings component and ThermalRingsProps interface
Props: { severity: number; severityColor: string }
Three SVGCircleElement refs: ring1Ref, ring2Ref, ring3Ref
Each circle: cx=200 cy=200 r=170 fill=none stroke={severityColor} initial opacity=0
Inline style on each circle: { transformBox: 'fill-box', transformOrigin: '50% 50%' }
useEffect: animates each ring with scale:[0.06,1] opacity:[0.75,0] duration=RING_DURATION[clamped] loop:true delay=(duration/3)*i for i=0,1,2
useEffect dependency array: [clamped, reducedMotion]
useEffect cleanup: pause all 3 animations, reset ring.style.transform='' and ring.style.opacity='0' on each ring
clamped = Math.max(0, Math.min(3, Math.round(severity)))
useReducedMotion: if true, set each ring opacity to String(0.15 - i*0.04) without animate
suppressHydrationWarning on each animated <circle> element
Imports: animate from 'animejs'
Imports useReducedMotion from '../../lib/useReducedMotion'
cd /Users/hussianaltufayli/Downloads/LatentLap-AI-main/dashboard && npx tsc --noEmit shows 0 errors

userStories.title: Update TireHero.tsx — swap components + delete old files + remove unused consts
userStories.description: As a developer I need TireHero to use the new EKGPulse and ThermalRings and to have the old TireTread and TireRings files deleted along with their now-unused constants.
acceptanceCriteria: dashboard/app/components/TireHero.tsx imports ThermalRings from './ThermalRings' (NOT TireRings)
dashboard/app/components/TireHero.tsx imports EKGPulse from './EKGPulse' (NOT TireTread)
TireHero JSX renders <ThermalRings severity={severity} severityColor={severityColor} /> in the position TireRings previously occupied
TireHero JSX renders <EKGPulse severity={severity} severityColor={severityColor} /> in the position TireTread previously occupied
TireHero.tsx does NOT import TireRings or TireTread
TireHero.tsx does NOT contain COMPOUND_COLOR constant
TireHero.tsx does NOT contain 'const compound' variable
TireHero.tsx does NOT contain 'const compoundColor' variable
dashboard/app/components/TireTread.tsx has been deleted (git rm)
dashboard/app/components/TireRings.tsx has been deleted (git rm)

userStories.title: Visual verification — dev server, all severities, reduced-motion
userStories.description: As a developer I need to confirm the dashboard renders correctly at all severity levels and respects reduced-motion preferences.
acceptanceCriteria: cd /Users/hussianaltufayli/Downloads/LatentLap-AI-main/dashboard && npm run dev starts without errors
Browser at http://localhost:3000 shows EKG waveform drawing itself inside the hub area behind the severity number
Thermal rings pulse outward from center with severity color
TireParticles still render and orbit (unchanged component)
Changing lap to severity 0 shows slow green EKG + slow green rings
Changing lap to severity 3 shows fast red EKG with taller spikes + fast red rings
No console errors in browser DevTools
Typecheck passes
